Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sharon Levy appearing in propria persona 925/286-3462, moving To determine Judges, Membership With BASF, To Order Court-Reporter Firm To Sell Deposition At A Reasonable Price

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Plaintiff presented his argument and made an oral motion for the Court to disqualify ifself. THE COURT took plaintiff SHARON LEVY'S oral request and MOTION To determine Judges, Membership With BASF, To Order Court-Reporter Firm To Sell Deposition At A Reasonable Price -- Motion to order Court-Reporter Firm to sell deposition at a reasonable price under submission. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
